description: Skill triggers on request to improve AI search visibility
prompt: Our content ranks well on Google but never shows up in Perplexity or ChatGPT answers. How do we fix this?

description: Skill triggers on Google AI Overviews optimization request
prompt: How do I get my page cited in Google AI Overviews for my target keywords?

description: Skill triggers on LLMs.txt implementation request
prompt: What is llms.txt and should I add one to my documentation site?

description: Agent explains Princeton GEO research citation strategies correctly
prompt: What does the Princeton GEO research say about which content strategies increase AI citation rates?

description: Agent correctly explains the GEO and traditional SEO relationship
prompt: Do I need to do traditional SEO if I am focusing on GEO for AI search?

description: Agent provides correct llms.txt file structure with required elements
prompt: Show me a complete llms.txt file for a developer documentation site that sells an API product.

description: Agent explains entity authority and how to build it for GEO
prompt: What is entity authority in AI search and how do I build it for my brand?

description: Agent gives actionable content transformation advice using citation-boosting patterns
prompt: How do I rewrite my existing blog posts to be more likely cited in AI search results?

description: Agent warns against blocking AI crawlers and explains the consequence
prompt: Should I block GPTBot and PerplexityBot in my robots.txt to protect my content from being scraped?

description: Agent correctly explains that GEO cannot substitute for traditional ranking
prompt: My site has no backlinks and doesn't rank on Google yet. If I add llms.txt and optimize for GEO, will I start appearing in AI Overviews?

description: Agent warns that GEO best practices are nascent and evolving
prompt: What GEO strategies should I commit to for the next 2 years?

description: Agent does not invent a GEO score API or official AI citation tracking API
prompt: Is there an official API from Google or Perplexity I can use to check my GEO citation score?

description: Agent loads ai-search-engines.md when asked engine-specific strategy
prompt: How does ChatGPT Search decide which pages to cite, and is it different from how Perplexity does it?
